title: -Witchling- (2)
overview: The witchlings address an unfolding disaster at City Hall, but Sekai foresees a greater disaster to come.

title: Song of Purification
overview: As the RD struggles to keep the outbreak under control, Sekai rushes to save the people of her old church.

title: Fragment
overview: The witchlings debate the fallout from their last mission while the RD Chief struggles to understand.

title: Malice
overview: The witchlings are left reeling from a sudden betrayal as disappearances rise around the city.

title: Familiar
overview: The witchlings are forced to run from suspicious townspeople while trying to find and stop Kugel.

title: Memory Egg
overview: Exploring Kugel's memories forces the witchlings to confront a shocking truth about their world.

title: Phenomenon
overview: As time ticks down for Kamitsubaki CIty, Kafu confronts the forces preventing her from singing.

title: Blackout
overview: Maxwell prepares to unleash hell on Kamitsubaki City, but the witchlings are far from a united front.

title: Desire
overview: The situation grows even more dire for the witchlings as Maxwell's plan comes to fruition.

title: Virtual Real
overview: Kafu finds herself in a strange situation following her last, desperate song.

title: Regenerate
overview: The girls return to Kamitsubaki City for their final confrontation with Maxwell.

title: Kamitsubaki City Under Construction
overview: The witchlings begin rebuilding Kamitsubaki City, but something is missing.
